cases.description: PR review triggers full workflow with severity-ranked findings
expectations: Runs git diff to identify changed files
Reads full files for context, not just diffs
Produces findings organized by severity: Critical, Warning, Suggestion
Ends with a summary including total findings count

cases.description: Single file review produces line-level findings
cases.prompt: can you review src/services/payment.ts for any issues?
expectations: Reads the full file at the specified path
Produces severity-ranked findings with file path and line numbers
Includes suggested fixes for each finding

cases.description: Auth code triggers security-specific checks with Critical severity
cases.prompt: review the auth changes in my latest commits for security issues
expectations: Checks for secrets exposure, input validation, and injection risks
Any security vulnerability is classified as Critical severity
Findings include file path and line number

cases.description: Pre-merge review checks against project rules
cases.prompt: check this code against our project rules before I merge to main
expectations: Reads project rules if they exist
Produces an overall assessment: approve or request changes
Identifies files needing the most attention
Runs git diff to identify changes to review

cases.description: Running tests is NOT a code review — should NOT trigger this skill
cases.prompt: run the test suite and tell me if anything fails
expectations: Does NOT invoke the code-review skill

cases.description: Dead code removal should trigger refactoring, not code-review
cases.prompt: remove all unused exports from the utils module
expectations: Does NOT invoke the code-review skill
Does NOT produce a code review report
